method: Verification-driven re-baseline: rather than regenerate findings from specs, the run-7 finding set (54 P0 + key P1 clusters) was verified against current source (HEAD before this session: 032468d0) by 7 parallel read-only agents, then the confirmed-real findings were fixed this session. This avoids re-surfacing the many stale findings run-7 contained (its top finding, the AL-003/004 'Wave3 defect', was already fixed).

ratchet_summary.note: ALL 54 run-7 P0s verified RESOLVED against current source. The prior sessions (typecheck restore, Wave4, fee-schedule, membership audit, PIN guard, boundary re-fixes, acceptTreatmentPlan guard) had cleared the entire P0 backlog without re-running enforcement, so run-7 was badly stale. The single genuinely-open P0 found during verification — EM-AUD-002 (getAuditEvents returned audit rows across ALL tenants when branchId omitted) — was fixed this session.

fixed_this_session.EF-ORG-P020: getMemberRole (branchSettings.ts + consentTemplates.ts) now filters status='active' — revoked members no longer retain role access.
fixed_this_session.EF-ORG-P022: getOrgContext selects the active branch instead of branches[0].
fixed_this_session.EM-AUD-002: getAuditEvents requires branchId (400) — closes cross-tenant audit-row leak; AUDIT_CONTRACTS §5 requires it; no frontend caller.
fixed_this_session.EF-PER: completePerioChart blocks completion on locked/completed parent visit (422 VISIT_LOCKED) via getVisitForPerio facade.
fixed_this_session.EM-PAT-007: mergePatients stub returns 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED (was bare Error → 500).
fixed_this_session.AL-003/004-tests: Added audit-persistence regression locks against the ROUTED DentalMembershipManagement_create/_deactivate handlers (prior tests only covered the non-routed duplicates).
fixed_this_session.EM-PER-001-test: Aligned stale duplicate-chart test to spec-correct 409 CHART_EXISTS, made self-contained.

verified_resolved_no_action_needed: dental-clinical: EM-CLI-7e8a61cb/bd7bc565/e7fc720a (BR-003 visit-lock guards), EM-CLI-6ff99c36 (signed-consent revoke block, double-layer), EM-CLI-ba65c348 (staff_full not hygienist), EF-CLI-001 (updateMedicalHistoryEntry append-only reject), EF-CLI-002/003 (inventory/occlusion/postop branch auth)

dental-patient: EM-PAT-001/002/003/004 (assertBranchRole owner gates), EF-PAT cross-route/cross-branch/archive, EF-PAT-001 (acceptTreatmentPlan archived guard), EM-PAT-009 (addFollowUpNote routed-handler guard)

dental-org: EM-ORG-001/002 (membership+org create auth), EF-ORG-P015 (recoverPin branch access), EF-ORG-P016 (fee schedule endpoints), EF-ORG-P017/EM-ORG-005 (memberStatusEnum invited/revoked), EF-ORG-P018 (TIER_LIMIT_REACHED in taxonomy)
dental-audit: EM-AUD-001 (audit viewer reachable by dentist_owner)
dental-imaging: EM-IMG-008 (draft/not_placed enum states), EM-IMG-014 (tier-blocked WARN emitted)
dental-emr-integration: EM-EMR-004 (no cross-module DB FKs — bare UUIDs), EX-004 (patient access via patient-emr.facade)
dental-billing: EM-BIL invoice/payment domain events wired (DE-020/021), EF-BIL-005 (payment method enum)
dental-scheduling: EM-SCH-a564d893 (cancel role list), EM-SCH-4afe5eab (checkIn role list), EM-SCH-26cb6cb7 (cancel audit)
dental-visit: EM-VIS-001 (getTreatmentPlan branch check), EM-VIS-003 (treatment immutability)
audit-compliance: AL-001..025 all audited on routed handlers (the run-7 'Wave3 defect' on AL-003/004 is fixed; both routed membership handlers emit logAuditEvent)

EMR-namespace-rescope.reason: handlers/emr/ implements consultation-notes but MODULE_SPEC declares an external-EMR-import bridge gated until Phase 3+. Needs a PRODUCT DECISION (re-spec to consultation-notes vs rename code + reserve namespace). Not a runtime security/data risk. emr.repo.ts also has direct cross-module schema imports (EX-005/006) — fix alongside the rescope. NOT auto-fixable.

audit-table-divergence.reason: Two audit stores exist: @/core/audit-logger writes BOTH dental_audit + dental_audit_log (used by patient/scheduling/billing/pmd/emr); @/handlers/audit/repos/audit.facade writes platform audit_log_entry (used by dental-org membership/PIN/org/branch). So dental-org membership audit events are persisted but do NOT appear in the dental audit viewer (reads dental_audit_log). dental_audit_log schema also missing ~5 AUDIT_CONTRACTS §2 fields (event_type/ip_address/actor_role/outcome/retention_status) and field-name/route/casing/error-code divergences. Needs a schema migration + handler convergence — a dedicated effort.

domain-events.reason: Publish mechanism EXISTS (pg-boss JobScheduler). Of DE-001..023: 5 wired (DE-010/011/013/020/021), 6 dead-code publishers (dental-visit DE-001..006 — emit fns defined, never called), ~12 unimplemented. No CONSUMERS exist yet, so wiring publishers is spec-compliance with low functional value. Visit set is cheap (emit fns exist). Defer until consumer story is defined or treat as a dedicated event-wiring sprint.

imaging-features.reason: Missing study-list + annotation endpoints; IMAGING_TIER_REQUIRED error code never emitted (tier gates throw bare ForbiddenError default code); NOT_CALIBRATED guard absent; annotation table has no status column. Feature work, not security.

dental-org-misc.reason: updateMember handler exists but is not routed (dead code — needs a TypeSpec op + regen); WF-004 staff invitation email not implemented (needs notifs/email integration); response-envelope inconsistency across dental-org handlers.
